full_text:
Gao Zuo 高祚
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Zuo (高祚). Sent with others to launch a sneak attack, they took Yang Ren’s head. Gao Zuo was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
